---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd, math, json

df = pd.read_csv('events.csv')
def safe(v):
    return '' if (isinstance(v, float) and math.isnan(v)) else str(v).strip()

events = []
for _, r in df.iterrows():
    events.append({
        'year':    int(r['year']),
        'cat':     safe(r['category']),
        'sub':     safe(r['subcategory']),
        'title':   safe(r['title']),
        'authors': safe(r['authors']),
        'journal': safe(r['journal']),
        'vol':     safe(r['volume_issue_pages']),
        'inst':    safe(r['institution']),
        'pmid':    safe(r['pmid']),
        'desc':    safe(r['description']),
    })

print(f'<script>var EVENTS={json.dumps(events, ensure_ascii=False)};</script>')
```

```{=html}
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
  html, body {
    height: 100%; overflow: hidden;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif;
    background: #f0f4f8; color: #1e293b;
  }
  #quarto-content, main.content, .page-full,
  #quarto-document-content { padding:0!important; margin:0!important; height:100%!important; }

  /*
    Layout (all vh-based so browser recomputes on zoom):
      [0 → --hdr-h]       header
      [--hdr-h → --bar-bot] bar
      [--bar-bot → --bar-bot+--conn-gap] connector
      [--cards-top → 100vh-10px] card stacks
  */
  :root {
    --hdr-h:      58px;
    --bar-h:      50px;
    --conn-gap:   14px;
    --bar-top:    var(--hdr-h);
    --bar-bot:    calc(var(--hdr-h) + var(--bar-h));
    --bar-mid:    calc(var(--hdr-h) + 25px);
    --cards-top:  calc(var(--hdr-h) + var(--bar-h) + var(--conn-gap));
    --cards-avail: calc(100vh - var(--hdr-h) - var(--bar-h) - var(--conn-gap) - 10px);
  }

  #app { display:flex; flex-direction:column; height:100vh; }

  /* ── Header ── */
  #hdr {
    flex-shrink:0; height:var(--hdr-h);
    background:#fff; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;
    box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
    display:flex; align-items:center; padding:0 1.4rem; gap:.9rem;
    z-index:50; position:relative;
  }
  #hdr .title { font-size:.93rem; font-weight:700; color:#0f172a; white-space:nowrap; }
  #hdr .sep   { width:1px; height:24px; background:#e2e8f0; flex-shrink:0; }
  .chip {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px;
    padding:4px 10px; border-radius:20px; border:none;
    font-size:.71rem; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; color:#fff;
    transition:opacity .15s;
  }
  .chip.off { opacity:.3; }
  #hdr .hint { margin-left:auto; font-size:.67rem; color:#94a3b8; white-space:nowrap; }

  /* ── Scroll area (fills remaining height) ── */
  #scroll-wrap { flex:1; position:relative; overflow:hidden; background:#f0f4f8; }
  #scroll {
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden; cursor:grab;
  }
  #scroll:active { cursor:grabbing; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { height:4px; }
  #scroll::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background:#cbd5e1; border-radius:2px; }

  /* ── Canvas ── */
  #canvas { position:relative; height:100%; min-width:3800px; }

  /* ── Bar — pinned to top of scroll area ── */
  #bar {
    position:absolute;
    top:0; height:var(--bar-h); left:0; right:0;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f0f4f8 0%,#1e3a5f 12%,#1e3a5f 88%,#f0f4f8 100%);
    border-bottom:2px solid #1e3a5f;
    z-index:20;
  }

  /* ── Year labels inside bar ── */
  .yr {
    position:absolute; top:0; height:var(--bar-h);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    font-weight:800; letter-spacing:-.02em; font-size:22px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);
    transform:translateX(-50%); pointer-events:none; z-index:25;
  }

  /* ── Per-year group ── */
  .yr-group {
    position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0;
    width:186px; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:10;
  }

  /* ── Dot — sits on bar bottom edge ── */
  .dot {
    position:absolute;
    top:calc(var(--bar-h) - 6px);
    width:13px; height:13px; border-radius:50%;
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:30; border:2.5px solid #fff;
    box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
    transition:transform .2s;
  }
  .yr-group:hover .dot { transform:translateX(-50%) scale(1.5); }

  /* ── Connector from bar-bottom to card stack ── */
  .conn {
    position:absolute; width:2px;
    left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); z-index:8; opacity:.55;
    top:var(--bar-h); height:var(--conn-gap);
  }

  /* ── Card stack — all below bar, fills remaining viewport ── */
  .stack {
    position:absolute; left:0; right:0;
    top:calc(var(--bar-h) + var(--conn-gap));
    bottom:0;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:5px; overflow:hidden;
  }

  /* ── Cards — aspect-ratio keeps shape on any zoom level ── */
  .ev-card {
    border-radius:8px; padding:6px 9px;
    cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0; overflow:hidden;
    aspect-ratio: 2.3 / 1;   /* width:height — px-based, zoom-stable */
    height: auto !important;  /* let aspect-ratio drive height */
    transition:box-shadow .15s, transform .15s; border:none;
  }
  .ev-card:hover { box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.22); transform:translateY(-1px); }

  .ev-card.grant     { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e3a8a 0%,#2563eb 100%); }
  .ev-card.pub       { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#991b1b 0%,#dc2626 100%); }
  .ev-card.uthsa     { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5b21b6 0%,#7c3aed 100%); }
  .ev-card.milestone { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#065f46 0%,#059669 100%); }

  .ev-card .c-top   { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; margin-bottom:3px; }
  .ev-card .c-emoji { font-size:12px; line-height:1; flex-shrink:0; }
  .ev-card .c-type  {
    font-size:8px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
  }
  .ev-card .c-title {
    font-size:10.5px; font-weight:600; line-height:1.3; color:#fff;
    overflow:hidden; display:-webkit-box;
    -webkit-box-orient:vertical; -webkit-line-clamp:3;
  }

  .dot.grant     { background:#2563eb; }
  .dot.pub       { background:#dc2626; }
  .dot.uthsa     { background:#7c3aed; }
  .dot.milestone { background:#059669; }
  .conn.grant     { background:#2563eb; }
  .conn.pub       { background:#dc2626; }
  .conn.uthsa     { background:#7c3aed; }
  .conn.milestone { background:#059669; }

  /* ── Detail tooltip ── */
  #detail {
    position:fixed; width:280px;
    background:#fff; border:1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius:11px; padding:14px 16px;
    font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.55; color:#334155;
    box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.18);
    z-index:1000; pointer-events:none;
    opacity:0; transition:opacity .15s;
  }
  #detail.show { opacity:1; }
  #detail .d-accent { height:3px; margin:-14px -16px 11px; border-radius:11px 11px 0 0; }
  #detail .d-title  { font-weight:700; font-size:12.5px; color:#0f172a; margin-bottom:5px; line-height:1.3; }
  #detail .d-cite   {
    font-size:10px; color:#64748b; margin-bottom:7px;
    white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;
  }
  #detail .d-desc   { color:#475569; font-size:11px; line-height:1.5; }
</style>

<div id="app">
  <div id="hdr">
    <div class="title">HCC Research &mdash; Grants &amp; Key Publications &mdash; Texas 2009&ndash;2025</div>
    <div class="sep"></div>
    <button class="chip" id="f-grant"     style="background:#1d4ed8" onclick="toggleFilter('grant')"    >&#127942; Grants</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-pub"       style="background:#dc2626" onclick="toggleFilter('pub')"      >&#128196; Publications</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-uthsa"     style="background:#7c3aed" onclick="toggleFilter('uthsa')"    >&#128300; UTHSA</button>
    <button class="chip" id="f-milestone" style="background:#059669" onclick="toggleFilter('milestone')" >&#127919; Milestones</button>
    <div class="hint">Drag to scroll &nbsp;·&nbsp; Hover for details</div>
  </div>

  <div id="scroll-wrap">
    <div id="scroll">
      <div id="canvas"><div id="bar"></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="detail"></div>

<script>
(function () {
  var EMOJI  = { grant:'🏆', pub:'📄', uthsa:'🔬', milestone:'🎯' };
  var ACCENT = { grant:'#2563eb', pub:'#dc2626', uthsa:'#7c3aed', milestone:'#059669' };
  var TYPE_ORDER = { uthsa:0, milestone:1, grant:2, pub:3 };

  function typeOf(cat, sub) {
    if (cat === 'Grant')       return 'grant';
    if (cat === 'Milestone')   return 'milestone';
    if (sub === 'Ramirez Lab') return 'uthsa';
    return 'pub';
  }

  /* ── Group by year (active only) ── */
  var byYear = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e) {
    e.type = typeOf(e.cat, e.sub);
    (byYear[e.year] = byYear[e.year] || []).push(e);
  });
  var years = Object.keys(byYear).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;});

  /* ── X: active years evenly spaced ── */
  var CANVAS_W = 3800, PAD = 200;
  var USABLE   = CANVAS_W - PAD * 2;
  var N        = years.length;
  var spacing  = N > 1 ? USABLE / (N - 1) : 0;
  function xFor(yr) { return PAD + years.indexOf(yr) * spacing; }

  function dominantType(evs) {
    var cnt = {};
    evs.forEach(function(e){ cnt[e.type]=(cnt[e.type]||0)+1; });
    return Object.keys(cnt).sort(function(a,b){return cnt[b]-cnt[a];})[0];
  }

  /* card height is driven by aspect-ratio in CSS — no JS calc needed */

  /* ── Build DOM ── */
  var canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');

  years.forEach(function(yr){
    var evs = byYear[yr].slice();
    evs.sort(function(a, b){
      return (TYPE_ORDER[a.type]||99) - (TYPE_ORDER[b.type]||99);
    });

    var dom = dominantType(evs);
    var x   = xFor(yr);

    /* year label */
    var lbl = document.createElement('div');
    lbl.className   = 'yr';
    lbl.style.left  = x + 'px';
    lbl.textContent = yr;
    canvas.appendChild(lbl);

    /* group */
    var grp = document.createElement('div');
    grp.className  = 'yr-group';
    grp.style.left = x + 'px';

    var dot = document.createElement('div');
    dot.className = 'dot ' + dom;
    grp.appendChild(dot);

    var conn = document.createElement('div');
    conn.className = 'conn ' + dom;
    grp.appendChild(conn);

    var stack = document.createElement('div');
    stack.className = 'stack';
    grp.appendChild(stack);

    evs.forEach(function(e){
      var card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className    = 'ev-card ' + e.type;
      card.dataset.type = e.type;

      var label = e.type === 'uthsa' ? 'UTHSA' : e.cat;
      card.innerHTML =
        '<div class="c-top">' +
          '<span class="c-emoji">' + EMOJI[e.type] + '</span>' +
          '<span class="c-type">' + label + ' &middot; ' + e.year + '</span>' +
        '</div>' +
        '<div class="c-title">' + e.title + '</div>';

      card.addEventListener('mouseenter', function(ev){ showDetail(e, ev.currentTarget); });
      card.addEventListener('mouseleave', hideDetail);
      stack.appendChild(card);
    });

    canvas.appendChild(grp);
  });

  /* ── Detail tooltip ── */
  var det = document.getElementById('detail');
  function showDetail(e, el){
    var col = ACCENT[e.type] || '#888';
    var h = '<div class="d-accent" style="background:' + col + '"></div>';
    h += '<div class="d-title">' + EMOJI[e.type] + ' ' + e.title + '</div>';
    var cite = [e.year + ''];
    if(e.authors) cite.push(e.authors);
    if(e.journal) cite.push(e.journal + (e.vol ? ' ' + e.vol : ''));
    if(e.inst)    cite.push(e.inst);
    if(e.pmid)    cite.push('PMID ' + e.pmid);
    h += '<div class="d-cite">' + cite.join(' &middot; ') + '</div>';
    if(e.desc) h += '<div class="d-desc">' + e.desc + '</div>';
    det.innerHTML = h;

    var r = el.getBoundingClientRect(), top = r.top, left = r.right + 10;
    if(left + 280 > window.innerWidth)  left = r.left - 290;
    if(top + det.offsetHeight > window.innerHeight - 10)
      top = window.innerHeight - det.offsetHeight - 10;
    det.style.top  = Math.max(10, top) + 'px';
    det.style.left = left + 'px';
    det.classList.add('show');
  }
  function hideDetail(){ det.classList.remove('show'); }

  /* ── Drag scroll ── */
  var scroll = document.getElementById('scroll');
  var isDown = false, sx, sl;
  scroll.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e){ isDown=true; sx=e.pageX-scroll.offsetLeft; sl=scroll.scrollLeft; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mouseleave', function(){ isDown=false; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mouseup',   function(){ isDown=false; });
  scroll.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e){
    if(!isDown) return; e.preventDefault();
    scroll.scrollLeft = sl - (e.pageX - scroll.offsetLeft - sx);
  });

  /* ── Filter ── */
  var hidden = {};
  window.toggleFilter = function(type){
    hidden[type] = !hidden[type];
    document.getElementById('f-' + type).classList.toggle('off', !!hidden[type]);
    document.querySelectorAll('.ev-card[data-type="' + type + '"]').forEach(function(el){
      el.style.display = hidden[type] ? 'none' : '';
    });
  };
})();
</script>
```
